item.title: 苹果 2027 年将迎产品大年，新款 MacBook Pro、iPad Pro 与 M7 芯片齐发
item.guid: 苹果-2027-年将迎产品大年，新款-MacBook-Pro、iPad-Pro-与-M7-芯片齐发
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Apple plans to release several new hardware products in the first half of next year to celebrate the 20th anniversary of the iPhone's launch. 据彭博社报道，苹果计划于明年上半年发布多款硬件新品，以迎接 iPhone 问世 20 周年。

Regarding the product line, Apple is testing four new iPad Pro models, maintaining 11-inch and 13-inch screen sizes, with a focus on upgrading internal performance and potentially introducing a VC cooling system. Meanwhile, a new 14-inch entry-level MacBook Pro, codenamed K104, is expected to be released in the first half of next year, featuring a brand-new design. 产品线方面，苹果正测试四款新款 iPad Pro，屏幕尺寸维持 11 英寸与 13 英寸，重点升级内部性能并有望引入 VC 散热系统。同时，代号为 K104 的新款 14 英寸入门级 MacBook Pro 预计明年上半年问世，将采用全新外观设计。

Core chips will also see rapid iteration. Apple plans to launch the M7 processor as early as the first half of next year, aiming to optimize support for AI workloads by shortening the iteration cycle. 核心芯片也将迎来快速更迭。苹果计划最快于明年上半年推出 M7 处理器，旨在通过缩短迭代周期，优化对 AI 工作负载的支持。

In addition, Apple is also expected to release the second-generation iPhone Air and the entry-level iPhone 18 in the first half of next year. On its 20th anniversary, Apple also plans to launch a commemorative edition iPhone, a second-generation foldable iPhone, its first smart glasses, and new smart home devices. 此外，明年上半年苹果还预计发布第二代 iPhone Air 及 iPhone 18 入门版。在 20 周年之际，苹果还计划推出纪念版 iPhone、第二代折叠屏 iPhone、首款智能眼镜及全新智能家居设备。

item.title: 马斯克否认 SpaceX 研发 AI 手机：相关原型机报道「完全错误」
item.guid: 马斯克否认-SpaceX-研发-AI-手机：相关原型机报道「完全错误」
item.description:
Yesterday, Elon Musk posted on X, commenting on a rumor that "SpaceX recently showed investors a prototype of a phone-like AI device," stating that the related reports were "completely false." 昨天，埃隆·马斯克在 X 发文评论一则关于「SpaceX 近日向投资者展示了一款类手机的 AI 设备原型」的传闻时，表示相关报道「完全错误」。

The Wall Street Journal previously reported that before SpaceX launched a record-breaking IPO in June, it showed some investors a hardware prototype designed to reshape AI interaction. The device is thinner than Apple's iPhone, is expected to be powered by a Qualcomm Snapdragon chip, and runs a proprietary operating system integrating xAI technology. 《华尔街日报》此前的报道称，SpaceX 在 6 月启动创纪录 IPO 前，向部分投资者展示了一款旨在重塑 AI 交互方式的硬件原型。该设备机身比苹果 iPhone 更薄，预计搭载高通骁龙芯片，并运行集成 xAI 技术的专有操作系统。

The report pointed out that Musk's long-term vision is to have a consumer-grade platform that can carry the technologies of his various businesses, reducing reliance on external app stores. 报道指出，马斯克长期愿景是拥有一款能承载其旗下业务技术的消费级平台，以减少对外部应用商店的依赖。

The Verge reported that Musk had previously expressed aversion to developing a phone multiple times, stating that the idea made him "wish he were dead," and explicitly stated in February this year that SpaceX "is not developing a phone." The Verge 报道称 ，此前马斯克也曾多次对开发手机表达排斥，称这一想法让他「生不如死」，并在今年 2 月明确表示 SpaceX「没有在开发手机」。

item.title: 应对存储荒，苹果要求供应商为 iPhone 18 系列提前储备通用零部件
item.guid: 应对存储荒，苹果要求供应商为-iPhone-18-系列提前储备通用零部件
item.description:
According to Cailian Press, against the backdrop of a global shortage of storage components in the consumer electronics industry, Apple is bucking the trend by asking suppliers to increase production forecasts to seize more market share. 据财联社报道，在当前全球消费电子行业面临存储零部件短缺的背景下，苹果正在逆势要求供应商提高产量预期，以抢占更多市场份额。

Sources revealed that Apple has asked suppliers to prepare for the production of approximately 10 million foldable iPhones this year, a figure higher than the previously estimated 7 to 8 million units. 知情人士透露，苹果已要求供应商为今年生产约 1000 万台可折叠 iPhone 做好准备，这一数字高于此前预计的 700 万至 800 万台。

Apple had previously pre-ordered components for 80 million devices for its first foldable phone model and the iPhone 18 Pro series, set to launch in the second half of 2026. The latest news indicates that Apple has informed some suppliers that the production of new iPhones in the second half of the year could reach as high as 85 million units. 苹果此前已为 2026 年下半年推出的首款折叠屏机型及 iPhone 18 Pro 系列预订了 8000 万台设备的零部件。最新消息显示，苹果已向部分供应商透露，下半年新款 iPhone 的产量可能高达 8500 万台。

Furthermore, Apple is actively taking measures to ensure component supply, requiring suppliers to prepare some common conventional chips and components from the iPhone 17 series for the upcoming high-end iPhone 18 series. 此外，苹果正积极采取措施确保零部件供应，要求供应商为即将推出的 iPhone 18 高端系列准备部分 iPhone 17 系列通用的常规芯片和零部件。

item.title: 华为 HarmonyOS 6 终端设备数突破 7000 万
item.guid: 华为-HarmonyOS-6-终端设备数突破-7000-万
item.description:
Huawei's HarmonyOS official announced that the number of HarmonyOS 6 terminal devices has exceeded 70 million units. 华为鸿蒙操作系统官方宣布，HarmonyOS 6 终端设备数已突破 7000 万台。

Huawei previously disclosed that the open-source HarmonyOS ecosystem has over 1.3 billion devices, more than 11 million global developers, and over 380,000 HarmonyOS applications and services. Richard Yu stated in June that HarmonyOS has firmly established itself as China's second-largest mobile operating system. 华为此前披露，开源鸿蒙生态设备超过 13 亿台，全球开发者超过 1100 万，鸿蒙应用与服务超过 38 万。余承东 6 月曾表示，鸿蒙已经稳居中国第二大手机操作系统。

item.title: 任天堂回应全员涨薪 10% 传闻：2023 年的老黄历了
item.guid: 任天堂回应全员涨薪-10%-传闻：2023-年的老黄历了
item.description:
According to Nintendo Everything, Nintendo's official recently responded to earlier reports of a "10% salary increase for all employees," clarifying that the 10% pay raise was an adjustment already implemented in 2023, not a recent new action. 据 Nintendo Everything 报道，任天堂官方近日针对早前流传的「全员涨薪 10%」报道作出回应，明确表示 10% 的薪资涨幅是 2023 年就已经落地的调整，而非近期的新动作。

This information discrepancy stemmed from an incomplete summary of Nintendo Global President Shuntaro Furukawa's speech at the shareholders' meeting. In the latest clarification, Shuntaro Furukawa elaborated on Nintendo's compensation management philosophy, emphasizing that the company tends to set reasonable wage levels to respond to industry trends and the external social environment. 此次信息偏差源于任天堂全球总裁古川俊太郎在股东大会上的发言摘要不完整。在最新的说明中，古川俊太郎阐述了任天堂的薪酬管理理念，强调公司倾向于设定合理的工资水平，以应对行业趋势和外部社会环境。

He stated that salaries are the foundation of employees' livelihoods, and if compensation fluctuates sharply with performance, employees will find it difficult to work with peace of mind. Therefore, maintaining appropriate compensation levels is crucial for creating an innovative entertainment environment where employees can challenge themselves without fear of failure. 他表示，薪资是员工生计的基础，如果薪酬随业绩剧烈波动，员工将难以安心工作。因此，维持适当的薪酬水平对于营造一个让员工能够无惧失败、挑战创新娱乐环境至关重要。

item.title: Counterpoint：预计苹果首款折叠屏手机将贡献 29% 面板采购份额
item.guid: Counterpoint：预计苹果首款折叠屏手机将贡献-29%-面板采购份额
item.description:
Industry research firm Counterpoint Research released a report yesterday, predicting that after Apple's first foldable phone is launched, it will contribute approximately 29% of the procurement share in global foldable smartphone panel shipments in 2026. 行业研究机构 Counterpoint Research 昨日发布报告，预计苹果首款折叠屏手机上市后，将在 2026 年全球折叠屏智能手机面板出货量中贡献约 29% 采购份额。

The report predicts that global foldable smartphone panel shipments will be approximately 27.5 million units in 2026, a year-on-year increase of about 24%; the annual shipment value will be approximately 4.4 billion US dollars, a year-on-year increase of about 48%. In terms of brand procurement structure, Samsung is expected to remain in the lead with a share of about 31%; Apple's first year will be about 29%; and Huawei will be about 24%. 报告预计，2026 年全球折叠屏智能手机面板出货量约 2750 万片，同比增长约 24%；全年出货额约 44 亿美元，同比增长约 48%。从品牌采购结构看，三星预计仍居首位，份额约 31%；苹果首年约 29%；华为约 24%。

Counterpoint believes that the rebound will mainly be concentrated in the second half of the year, with combined shipments in the third and fourth quarters accounting for approximately 64% of the annual total. It also judges that Apple's entry will expand the market size and shift the competitive focus towards large-sized, horizontally inward-folding products with higher average selling prices, greater reliability, and fewer creases. Counterpoint 认为，反弹主要集中在下半年，第三季度和第四季度合计出货量约占全年 64%。它还判断，苹果进入后会扩大市场规模，并把竞争重点推向更高平均售价、更高可靠性和更低折痕的大尺寸横向内折产品。

item.title: 扎克伯格官宣卖算力，引发半导体暴跌
item.guid: 扎克伯格官宣卖算力，引发半导体暴跌
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, sources familiar with the matter revealed that Meta is preparing a cloud infrastructure business, with the core model being to sell its internal surplus AI computing power to external customers for revenue. 据彭博社报道，知情人士透露，Meta 正在筹备一项云基础设施业务，核心模式是将内部过剩的 AI 计算能力出售给外部客户以获取收入。

The report points out that this service will not only provide access to underlying computing power but also cover the commercial use of Meta's related artificial intelligence models. 报道指出，该项服务不仅提供底层算力的访问权限，还将涵盖 Meta 旗下相关人工智能模型的商业化使用。

To support its vast artificial intelligence strategy, Meta has recently been heavily investing in and acquiring expensive data centers and related infrastructure resources. 为支撑其庞大的人工智能战略，Meta 近期正大举投资并抢占昂贵的数据中心及相关基础设施资源。

The report reveals that Meta is currently betting on a data center project in Louisiana with a total investment of up to $20 billion, which provides fundamental hardware support for its massive computing power reserves and future cloud services. 报道披露，Meta 目前正押注位于路易斯安那州、总投资规模高达 200 亿美元的数据中心项目，这为其庞大的算力储备与未来的云端服务提供了基础硬件支撑。

Affected by this news, the US stock market showed significant divergence. 受此消息影响，美股市场呈现显著分化。

At the close of trading on the morning of July 2nd, Meta's stock price rose against the trend by 8.81%; meanwhile, independent cloud computing vendors, as its computing power suppliers and potential competitors, suffered heavy sell-offs, with Nebius and CoreWeave falling by over 14.5% and 13% respectively. At the same time, due to market concerns about a cooling down of the tech giants' computing power arms race, the semiconductor and storage sectors collectively experienced volatility. 7 月 2 日凌晨收盘，Meta 股价逆势上涨 8.81%；而作为其算力供应商及潜在竞争对手的独立云计算厂商则遭遇猛烈抛售，Nebius 与 CoreWeave 跌幅分别超 14.5% 及 13%。同时，由于市场担忧科技巨头算力军备竞赛降温，半导体及存储板块集体震荡。

The Philadelphia Semiconductor Index plunged over 6%, with storage giant Micron Technology falling 10.57%, SanDisk dropping over 11%, and core industry chain companies such as Intel, ASML, AMD, and TSMC all experiencing declines of over 5%. 费城半导体指数重挫超 6%，其中存储巨头美光科技大跌 10.57%，闪迪跌超 11%，英特尔、ASML、AMD 及台积电等核心产业链公司跌幅均超 5%。

item.title: 宇树科技获准 IPO 注册，拟登陆科创板
item.guid: 宇树科技获准-IPO-注册，拟登陆科创板
item.description:
The China Securities Regulatory Commission (CSRC) announced yesterday that it has approved Unitree Robotics' application for initial public offering (IPO) and listing on the STAR Market. 证监会昨日发布公告，同意宇树科技首次公开发行股票并在科创板上市的注册申请。

The approval document issued by the CSRC shows that Unitree Robotics' current stock issuance should be strictly implemented in accordance with the prospectus and underwriting plan submitted to the Shanghai Stock Exchange. This approval for IPO registration means that Unitree Robotics has officially entered the final stage of its listing. 证监会发布的批复文件显示，宇树科技本次发行股票应严格按照报送上海证券交易所的招股说明书和发行承销方案实施。此次获准 IPO 注册，意味着宇树科技正式进入上市发行的最后阶段。

item.title: SK 海力士计划投资约 514 亿美元新建 NAND 工厂
item.guid: SK-海力士计划投资约-514-亿美元新建-NAND-工厂
item.description:
According to Reuters, SK Hynix announced yesterday that it plans to invest 80 trillion Korean won, or approximately $51.46 billion, to build a new NAND memory chip factory, M17, in Cheongju, South Korea. According to the company's plan unveiled at the event, construction of the new plant will begin next year, with a target completion date before 2029. 据路透社报道，SK 海力士昨日表示，计划投资 80 万亿韩元，约合 514.6 亿美元，在韩国清州建设新的 NAND 存储芯片工厂 M17。按照公司在活动上公布的计划，新厂明年开工，目标是在 2029 年前建成。

In addition, SK Hynix's stock price experienced severe fluctuations yesterday afternoon, with its market capitalization evaporating by approximately $160 billion (about 1 trillion RMB) in a single day. 此外，海力士股价于昨日午后出现剧烈波动，单日市值蒸发约 1600 亿美元（约合人民币 10000 亿元）。

SK Hynix's closing price yesterday was 2,187,000 Korean won, a decrease of 14.57% from the previous trading day. Concurrently, Samsung Electronics' stock price also fell by over 9%, and Micron Technology's decline reached 10.57%. This collective downturn in the semiconductor sector resulted in a loss of tens of billions of dollars in market capitalization for major Asian tech companies. 海力士昨日收盘价为 2,187,000 韩元，较前一交易日下跌 14.57%。与此同时，三星电子股价也下跌超过 9%，美光科技跌幅达 10.57%。此次半导体板块的集体下挫，导致亚洲大型科技公司的市值缩水数百亿美元。

item.title: 奔驰中国设新部门：避免重蹈 CLA 覆辙
item.guid: 奔驰中国设新部门：避免重蹈-CLA-覆辙
item.description:
According to Auto Pixel, Mercedes-Benz China's sales system recently adjusted its organizational structure, establishing a new department called "Go to Market" (GTM), which is currently recruiting internally. 据汽车像素报道，奔驰中国销售体系近期调整组织架构，新设了一个名为「Go to Market」（GTM）的部门，新部门正在内部招聘中。

Insiders revealed that although the newly established GTM is a third-level department, it will report directly to Daniel Lescow, President and CEO of Mercedes-Benz Sales Company, who took office in March this year. The department head is expected to be Wang Jiangchuan, former Executive Assistant to the CEO, and the department is currently undergoing internal recruitment. 知情人士透露，新设立的 GTM 虽为三级部门，但将直接向今年 3 月履新的奔驰销售公司总裁兼首席执行官李德思（Daniel Lescow）汇报，部门负责人预计由前 CEO 执行助理王江川担任，目前该部门正进行内部招聘。

The core function of this department is to serve as a hub for product collaboration processes, addressing systemic disconnections in vehicles from product definition, pricing strategy, production scheduling, to channel conversion, and establishing an early-stage integrated error-proofing mechanism. 该部门的核心职能是作为产品协同流程枢纽，解决车辆从产品定义、定价策略、排产节奏到渠道转化之间的系统性断层问题，建立前期拉通的防错机制。

The report points out that this architectural adjustment directly addresses the recent market feedback on Mercedes-Benz new energy vehicles in China. 报道指出，此项架构调整直接针对奔驰新能源车型近期在华的市场反馈。

Taking the new all-electric CLA model based on the MMA architecture as an example, despite its localized adaptations such as end-to-end intelligent driving and large model integration, and a starting price reduced to 229,000 yuan, data from the China Passenger Car Association shows that the model's sales fell to 21 units in February this year and only 161 units in May. 以基于 MMA 架构的全新纯电车型 CLA 为例，尽管其进行了搭载端到端智驾、接入大模型等本土化适配，并将起售价下探至 22.9 万元，但据乘联会数据显示，该车型今年 2 月销量跌至 21 辆，5 月仅为 161 辆。

The establishment of the GTM department aims to complement capabilities in localized insights and end-to-end system collaboration, preventing subsequent product strategies from becoming disconnected from the Chinese market. 而 GTM 部门的设立意图补齐本土化洞察与端到端体系协同的能力，避免后续产品策略与中国市场脱节。

item.title: L2 辅助驾驶首个强制性国标发布，驾驶员脱手脱眼将被强制禁用
item.guid: L2-辅助驾驶首个强制性国标发布，驾驶员脱手脱眼将被强制禁用
item.description:
The Ministry of Industry and Information Technology (MIIT) officially released the mandatory national standard "Safety Requirements for Combined Driving Assistance Systems for Intelligent Connected Vehicles" (GB 47955—2026) yesterday. This standard is scheduled to be officially implemented from January 1, 2027. 工信部昨日正式发布《智能网联汽车组合驾驶辅助系统安全要求》（GB 47955—2026）强制性国家标准，该标准拟于 2027 年 1 月 1 日起正式实施。

This is the first mandatory national standard in China for L2-level assisted driving, filling a gap in safety regulations for this field. Industry-leading enterprises such as Huawei, Xiaomi, and BYD participated in the joint drafting of this standard. 这是国内首个针对 L2 级辅助驾驶的强制性国家标准，填补了该领域安全规范的空白。华为、小米、比亚迪等行业龙头企业参与了该标准的联合起草。

The standard clarifies the safety indicator system for L2-level "combined driving assistance systems." Regarding hand-off-wheel detection, if both hands are off the steering wheel for 5 seconds, the system will issue a prompt; if hands are not returned after the prompt, the warning will escalate. 该标准明确了 L2 级「组合驾驶辅助系统」的安全指标体系。在手部脱离检测方面，若双手脱离方向盘 5 秒，系统将发出提示；若提示后未握回，预警将升级。

In gaze deviation detection, if the system detects gaze deviation, it will issue a reminder within 5 seconds; if the gaze does not return after 5 seconds, an "immediate control warning" will be triggered. 在视线脱离检测中，系统若检测到视线偏离，将在 5 秒内发出提醒，若 5 秒后视线仍未回归则触发「立即控制警告」。

For behaviors that fail to respond to warnings in a timely manner, the new national standard introduces a penalty mechanism. If the driver fails to take over within 10 seconds after a warning is triggered, the system will initiate a risk mitigation function to actively intervene and find a safe spot to stop. 对于未能及时响应预警的行为，新国标引入了惩罚机制。若驾驶员在触发警告后 10 秒内仍未接管，系统将启动风险缓解功能主动介入并寻找安全点停车。

Furthermore, if the risk mitigation function is triggered or if escalated warnings are triggered multiple times within 30 minutes, the system will be forcibly disabled for 30 minutes. 此外，若出现触发风险缓解功能或在 30 分钟内多次触发升级预警等情况，系统将被强制禁用 30 分钟。

item.title: 奇瑞发布犀牛电池安全保障计划，承诺因电池热失控损毁赔付新车
item.guid: 奇瑞发布犀牛电池安全保障计划，承诺因电池热失控损毁赔付新车
item.description:
Chery Automobile officially released the "Rhino Battery Safety Assurance Plan" yesterday, introducing three safety commitments for both sold and currently available models equipped with Rhino batteries. This plan aims to respond to mandatory national standards such as the "Safety Requirements for Power Batteries for Electric Vehicles" (GB 38031-2025), which officially came into effect on July 1st this year. 奇瑞汽车昨日正式发布「犀牛电池安全保障计划」，针对搭载犀牛电池的已售及在售车型推出三项安全承诺。该计划旨在响应自今年 7 月 1 日起正式实施的《电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求》（GB 38031-2025）等强制性国家标准。

  • All Chery models, both sold and currently available, equipped with Rhino batteries, have power battery safety performance that meets the latest national standards; 奇瑞所有搭载犀牛电池的已售及在售车型，其动力电池安全性能均满足最新国家标准；
  • If the entire vehicle is damaged by thermal runaway due to the power battery's own reasons, Chery will compensate with a new car of the same model; 若因动力电池自身原因导致整车发生热失控损毁，奇瑞将赔付同款新车；
  • For the first non-commercial owner, Chery provides a "lifetime warranty for the three core components," covering the power battery, drive motor, and electronic control unit. 针对首任非营运车主，奇瑞提供涵盖动力电池、驱动电机及电控单元在内的「三电终身质保」。

This assurance plan extends "safety bottom-line" coverage to already sold models, marking a shift in automakers' focus on battery safety from mere technical parameter testing to vehicle synergy, quality control, and the boundaries of after-sales responsibility. 此次保障计划将「安全兜底」覆盖至已售车型，标志着车企对电池安全的关注重点正从单一的技术参数测试，延伸至整车协同、质量管控以及售后责任边界。

Against the backdrop where the industry generally includes "thermal runaway" in disclaimer clauses, this move signifies that battery safety competition has entered a new phase of standards, responsibilities, and user guarantees. 在行业普遍将「热失控」列入免责条款的背景下，此举意味着电池安全竞争已进入标准、责任和用户保障的新阶段。

item.title: 理想马赫 M100 芯片论文入选 ISCA 2026 工业分区
item.guid: 理想马赫-M100-芯片论文入选-ISCA-2026-工业分区
item.description:
Li Auto officially announced yesterday that its team will present at ISCA 2026, delivering a keynote speech titled "Mach M100: An Orchestrated Dataflow Architecture for General AI Computing," and engaging in discussions with researchers from companies like Google and Meta. 理想汽车昨天官宣，团队登台 ISCA 2026，发表题为《马赫 M100：面向通用 AI 计算的编排式数据流架构》的主题演讲，并与 Google、Meta 等公司研究者同台交流。

ISCA is one of the top conferences in the field of computer architecture, alongside MICRO, HPCA, and ASPLOS, making up the world's four major top conferences in computational architecture. Li Auto states that since the establishment of the industrial track in 2020, Li Auto is the first Chinese automotive enterprise to be selected for this track. ISCA 是计算机体系结构领域顶级会议之一，与 MICRO、HPCA、ASPLOS 并列为全球计算体系结构四大顶会。理想汽车称，自 2020 年工业分区设立以来，理想汽车是首家入选该分区的中国汽车企业。

Li Auto states that the Mach M100 has been mass-produced and integrated into the new Li Auto L9 and new Li Auto L8. Over the past three years, Li Auto has published over 50 papers in areas such as embodied perception, foundation models, inference chips, and operating systems, with papers accepted by conferences such as ICCV, CVPR, ECCV, ICML, and ICRA. 理想汽车称，马赫 M100 已随全新理想 L9 和全新理想 L8 量产上车。过去三年，理想在具身感知、基座模型、推理芯片和操作系统等方向发表超过 50 篇论文，并有论文被 ICCV、CVPR、ECCV、ICML、ICRA 等会议录用。

item.title: 可灵 AI 获 30 亿美元融资：腾讯阿里百度加持，估值达 180 亿元
item.guid: 可灵-AI-获-30-亿美元融资：腾讯阿里百度加持，估值达-180-亿元
item.description:
According to Leidi, Kuaishou's video generation large model, Koling AI, has secured $300 million in funding, with a post-investment valuation reaching 18 billion RMB. 据雷递报道，快手旗下的视频生成大模型可灵 AI 获 30 亿美元融资，投后估值达 180 亿元人民币。

This round of financing was jointly led by CPE Yuanfeng, Guofang Venture Capital, BlueFive, Tencent, Zhongguancun Science City Fund, and CITIC Securities, with participation from industrial capital such as Alibaba Cloud and Baidu, as well as cultural and entertainment industry parties including Huace Film & TV and Mango Industry Investors. 本轮融资由 CPE 源峰、国方创投、BlueFive、腾讯、中关村科学城基金、中信证券联合领投，阿里云、百度等产业资本，以及华策影视、芒果产业投资人等文娱产业方共同参与。

item.title: 乐享科技完成近 5 亿元 Pre-A 轮融资，发布家庭具身智能品牌「元点 Zeroth」
item.guid: 乐享科技完成近-5-亿元-Pre-A-轮融资，发布家庭具身智能品牌「元点-Zeroth」
item.description:
JoyIn announced the recent completion of nearly 500 million RMB in Pre-A round financing and launched its home embodied intelligence brand "Zeroth." The company states that its cumulative financing has reached 1 billion RMB since its establishment a year and a half ago. 乐享科技 JoyIn 宣布近日完成近 5 亿元 Pre-A 轮融资，并发布家庭具身智能品牌「元点 Zeroth」。公司称，成立一年半以来累计融资额已达 10 亿元。

This round of financing was led by Ant Group, with follow-on investments from industrial parties and institutions such as Geely Capital, 37 Interactive Entertainment, and Oriza Seed, and continuous follow-on investment from existing shareholder Monolith. The funding will be used for 6 core technology self-developments, talent acquisition, and global market expansion. 本轮融资由蚂蚁集团领投，吉利资本、三七互娱、元禾璞华等产业方和机构跟投，老股东 Monolith 持续追投。融资将用于 6 项核心技术自研、人才引入和全球市场开拓。

JoyIn also disclosed that the company's orders for home embodied intelligence products have exceeded 30,000 units, covering scenarios such as smart homes, preschool education, and pet companionship; revenue in the first half of 2026 increased by 600% year-on-year. 乐享科技同时披露，公司家庭具身智能订单已突破 3 万台，覆盖智慧家庭、学前教育、宠物陪伴等场景；2026 年上半年营收同比增长 600%。

The new brand "Zeroth" simultaneously previewed two home embodied intelligence products: the full-size humanoid robot Jupiter, and the robot N1, which focuses on home collaboration. 新品牌「元点 Zeroth」同步预告两款家庭具身智能产品：全尺寸人形机器人 Jupiter，以及以家庭协作为核心的机器人 N1。

item.title: 💡 Palantir CEO 抨击 Token 计费：企业需要掌握生产资料所有权
item.guid: 💡-Palantir-CEO-抨击-Token-计费：企业需要掌握生产资料所有权
item.description:
According to CNBC, Palantir CEO Alex Karp fiercely criticized the token billing model adopted by AI labs like OpenAI and Anthropic in an interview, stating that this structure is facing serious problems. 据 CNBC 报道，Palantir CEO Alex Karp 在接受采访时猛烈抨击了 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 等 AI 实验室采用的 Token 计费模式，称这一结构正面临严重问题。

Karp pointed out that as AI usage costs soar, the business community is becoming increasingly frustrated with this "tokenmaxxing" business model. Karp 指出，随着 AI 使用成本飙升，企业界对这种「Token 最大化（tokenmaxxing）」的商业模式感到愈发沮丧。

Karp believes that as new models become more expensive than previous versions, businesses are shifting from pursuing token counts to pursuing return on investment (ROI). This shift has prompted some companies to adopt open-source weight models, as these models can accomplish similar tasks at very low costs. Karp 认为，随着新模型比以往版本更加昂贵，企业正在从追求 Token 数量转向追求投资回报率（ROI）。这种转变促使一些企业开始采用开源权重模型，因为这类模型能以极低的成本完成类似任务。

Karp stated that Palantir's open-source solution, advanced in collaboration with Nvidia, is the way forward, because technical customers want full control over computing power, models, and data stacks. Karp 表示，Palantir 与英伟达合作推进的开源方案才是解决之道，因为技术型客户希望对算力、模型和数据栈拥有完全的控制权。

They want to know that they own the means of production, rather than handing them over to others.

Previously, Palantir had published a "Nine-Point Manifesto" on social platform X regarding the importance of AI sovereignty, explicitly opposing the token billing model and encouraging businesses to maintain ownership of their data. 此前，Palantir 已在社交平台 X 上发布了一份关于 AI 主权重要性的「九点宣言」，明确反对 Token 计费模式，并鼓励企业维护自身数据的所有权。

Karp also warned that the industry should not underestimate the speed of China's progress in the field of AI models. Currently, more and more business units are shifting from using general AI models to building and training more efficient private proprietary tools. Karp 同时警告称，行业不应低估中国在 AI 模型领域的进展速度。目前，越来越多的业务部门正从使用通用 AI 模型转向构建和训练更高效的私有专有工具。

item.title: 支付宝「阿宝」开放公测，可处理 72 类生活办事场景
item.guid: 支付宝「阿宝」开放公测，可处理-72-类生活办事场景
item.description:
Yesterday, Alipay's life service intelligent agent "Abao" opened for public beta. iOS and Android users can search for "Abao" or "Ant Abao" within the Alipay App to experience it, no longer requiring an invitation code. 昨天，支付宝生活服务智能体「阿宝」开放公测。iOS 和安卓用户可在支付宝 App 内搜索「阿宝」或「蚂蚁阿宝」体验，不再需要邀请码。

Alipay positions "Abao" as an entry point for life services. The 72 curated skills officially compiled cover scenarios such as home-visit services, travel inquiries, group purchase discounts, express delivery, social security and housing provident fund, document processing, bill analysis, transfers, chatting, and learning and fitness. 支付宝把「阿宝」定位为生活办事入口，官方整理的 72 项精选技能覆盖居家上门服务、出行查询、团购优惠、快递收发、社保公积金、证件办理、账单分析、转账、陪聊和学习健身等场景。

item.title: 阿里云秒悟 Meoo 上线夜间计划，Qwen 3.7-Max 费用低至 2 折
item.guid: 阿里云秒悟-Meoo-上线夜间计划，Qwen-3.7-Max-费用低至-2-折
item.description:
Alibaba Cloud yesterday announced the launch of Meoo "Night Plan". During Beijing time from 22:00 every night to 08:00 the next day, Pro and Max package users can enjoy significant off-peak discounts when using designated models on the meoo.com web interface. 阿里云昨日宣布上线秒悟 Meoo「Night Plan」夜享计划。在北京时间每晚 22:00 至次日 08:00 期间，Pro 及 Max 套餐用户在 meoo.com 网页端使用指定模型，可享受大幅度错峰折扣。

During off-peak hours, the cost of calling the flagship model Qwen 3.7-Max is as low as 20% of the original price, and calling the Qwen 3.7-Plus model is as low as 40% of the original price. The system will automatically calculate the discount based on the task request time and deduct package points proportionally, without users needing to manually switch settings. 在错峰时段内，调用旗舰模型 Qwen 3.7-Max 的费用低至 2 折，调用 Qwen 3.7-Plus 模型则低至 4 折。系统将根据任务请求时间自动计算折扣并同比例扣减套餐积分，用户无需手动切换设置。

Alibaba Cloud stated that the plan aims to encourage users to schedule complex AI tasks during nighttime hours when computing resources are relatively abundant, thereby achieving up to 80% cost savings. 阿里云表示，该计划旨在鼓励用户将复杂的 AI 任务安排在算力资源相对充裕的夜间时段，从而实现最高 80% 的成本节省。

Regarding usage restrictions, this discount is currently only available to Pro and Max paid package users. Free package users and users who have only purchased points are not yet supported. 在使用限制方面，该折扣目前仅对 Pro 和 Max 付费套餐用户开放，Free 套餐及仅购买过积分的用户暂不支持。

item.title: 正确率仅三成，OpenAI 新基准 GeneBench-Pro 难倒顶级 AI
item.guid: 正确率仅三成，OpenAI-新基准-GeneBench-Pro-难倒顶级-AI
item.description:
OpenAI recently released GeneBench-Pro, an AI evaluation benchmark for computational biology, designed to test AI agents' decision-making capabilities when handling complex scientific research scenarios such as genetics and healthcare. OpenAI 日前发布针对计算生物学领域的 AI 评测基准 GeneBench-Pro，旨在测试 AI 智能体在处理基因、医疗等复杂科研场景时的决策能力。

The benchmark includes 129 professional questions that simulate real scientific experimental data, requiring AI to process data noise, correct analysis directions, and draw conclusions like a researcher. To ensure the authenticity of the test, OpenAI invited multiple external experts for review and used synthetic data to prevent models from "cheating" by taking shortcuts. 该基准包含 129 个专业问题，通过模拟真实的科学实验数据，要求 AI 像科研人员一样处理数据噪音、修正分析方向并得出结论。为了确保测试的真实性，OpenAI 邀请了多位外部专家进行评审，并采用合成数据防止模型通过走捷径「作弊」。

Test results show that top AI models still face significant challenges when handling such deep scientific research tasks. OpenAI's current strongest GPT-5.6 Sol model achieved a correctness rate of only 31.5% in Pro mode, while Claude Opus 4.8 had a correctness rate of only 16.0%. 测试结果显示，顶级 AI 模型在处理此类深度科研任务时依然面临巨大挑战。OpenAI 目前最强的 GPT-5.6 Sol 模型在开启 Pro 模式下的正确率仅为 31.5%，而 Claude Opus 4.8 的正确率仅有 16.0%。

item.title: Ramp Labs 推出跨模型适配框架 PorTAL，换大模型底座无需重新微调
item.guid: Ramp-Labs-推出跨模型适配框架-PorTAL，换大模型底座无需重新微调
item.description:
Fintech unicorn Ramp's AI lab, Ramp Labs, yesterday launched PorTAL, a cross-model adaptation framework. It aims to solve the problem of fine-tuning results being difficult to retain across versions due to frequent updates of large language models, allowing developers to quickly migrate fine-tuning capabilities without retraining when switching base models. 金融科技独角兽 Ramp 旗下的 AI 实验室 Ramp Labs 昨日推出了跨模型适配框架 PorTAL，旨在解决大语言模型频繁更新导致的微调成果难以跨版本留存的问题，允许开发者在更换基座模型时无需重新训练，即可实现微调能力的快速迁移。

Experimental data revealed that PorTAL can keep task latent representations and core decoders frozen during migration, halving the computational cost and data volume required for adaptation. In tests targeting the Qwen3 series models, this solution restored approximately 94% to 98% of the accuracy improvement effect of standard LoRA; 实验数据披露，PorTAL 在迁移时能够保持任务潜在表征和核心解码器冻结，使得适配所需的算力成本和数据量均可折半。在针对 Qwen3 系列模型的测试中，该方案恢复了标准 LoRA 约 94% 至 98% 的准确率提升效果；

And in cross-model family tests, migrating from Qwen3 to Gemma-3 also restored approximately 94% of the performance improvement. Furthermore, PorTAL demonstrated superior generalization ability and calibration effects compared to training LoRA from scratch across different data scales. 而在跨模型家族的测试中，从 Qwen3 迁移至 Gemma-3 同样能恢复约 94% 的性能提升。此外，PorTAL 在不同数据量级下均表现出比从头训练 LoRA 更优的泛化能力和校准效果。

item.title: Gemini Spark 登陆 macOS，可接管本地文件和桌面任务
item.guid: Gemini-Spark-登陆-macOS，可接管本地文件和桌面任务
item.description:
Google announced that Gemini Spark has begun integrating into the Gemini macOS application, providing automation capabilities for desktop files and local apps. This marks the first round of updates for Spark since its transition from web and mobile to desktop. Google 宣布，Gemini Spark 已开始进入 Gemini macOS 应用，面向桌面文件和本地 App 提供自动化能力。这是 Spark 从网页和移动端走向桌面后的第一轮更新。

Examples given by Google include: having Spark organize PDFs in the Downloads folder into different categories; reading local invoice files and generating budget sheets; connecting desktop files with Google Workspace to regularly update spreadsheets. Spark can only access files and folders explicitly authorized by the user. Google 给出的例子包括：让 Spark 把 Downloads 文件夹里的 PDF 按类别整理到不同文件夹；读取本地发票文件并生成预算表；把桌面文件与 Google Workspace 连接起来，定期更新表格。Spark 只能访问用户主动授权的文件和文件夹。

Google also announced that users will later be able to assign multi-step tasks to Spark on Mac from their phones, such as having it find sales reports, extract total revenue, and send emails on the computer. Gemini Spark for macOS is currently in Beta, available to Google AI Ultra subscribers aged 18 and above in the US. Google 还预告，后续用户可以从手机给 Mac 上的 Spark 分配多步骤任务，例如让它在电脑里找到销售报告、提取总营收并发邮件。Gemini Spark for macOS 目前为 Beta，面向美国 18 岁以上 Google AI Ultra 订阅用户开放。

item.title: 霸王茶姬回应小程序 0 元薅羊毛：系配置失误，异常订单将统一取消
item.guid: 霸王茶姬回应小程序-0-元薅羊毛：系配置失误，异常订单将统一取消
item.description:
Ba Wang Cha Ji's online ordering mini-program experienced a sudden system anomaly yesterday morning, causing the new "Yuanshan Xianqi" series special offer drinks to be incorrectly priced at 0 yuan. This glitch led to a large influx of consumers placing orders, and the instantaneous high traffic caused the mini-program's backend to crash. 霸王茶姬线上点餐小程序于昨日凌晨突发系统异常，导致原定上线的「远山鲜沏」系列新品特惠饮品标价错误显示为 0 元。该故障引发大量消费者涌入下单，瞬时高流量导致小程序后台崩溃。

Ba Wang Cha Ji's Hubei subsidiary issued an official apology statement this morning. The official statement indicated that the incident was caused by an operational backend configuration error, where the special offer product, originally priced at 9.9 yuan, was accidentally listed at 0 yuan. 霸王茶姬湖北子公司于今日上午发布官方致歉声明。官方表示，此次事件系运营后台配置失误所致，原定 9.9 元的特惠活动产品意外以 0 元上架。

Regarding this "free order mix-up," Ba Wang Cha Ji announced its follow-up solution: the system will uniformly cancel all abnormal 0-yuan orders generated from midnight today until the fix; to compensate for the user experience, Ba Wang Cha Ji announced that it will directly issue three "Yuanshan Xianqi" series 0.01 yuan no-threshold redemption coupons to each affected user's account. 针对此次「免单乌龙」，霸王茶姬公布了后续解决方案：系统将统一取消今日零点至修复前生成的所有 0 元异常订单；为弥补用户体验，霸王茶姬宣布将向每位受影响用户的账户直接发放三张「远山鲜沏」系列 0.01 元无门槛兑换券。

item.title: 东航宣布 7 月 3 日起宽体机航班空中 Wi-Fi 全免费
item.guid: 东航宣布-7-月-3-日起宽体机航班空中-Wi-Fi-全免费
item.description:
According to CBN, China Eastern Airlines announced today that starting from July 3, 2026, in-flight Wi-Fi will be completely free on all wide-body flights operated by China Eastern Airlines and its subsidiary Shanghai Airlines. 第一财经报道，东方航空今日宣布，自 2026 年 7 月 3 日起，东航及旗下上海航空所有宽体机航班空中 Wi-Fi 全免费。

According to the rules announced by China Eastern Airlines, premium economy and economy class passengers will receive standard data, while business and first-class passengers will receive high-speed data. Previously, China Eastern Airlines had gradually opened up free internet access on all domestic routes and some international routes operated by wide-body aircraft; this adjustment now extends to both domestic and international wide-body flights. 按东航公布的规则，超级经济舱和经济舱旅客可获得标准版流量，公务舱和头等舱旅客可获得高速版流量。此前，东航已陆续放开宽体机执飞的全部国内航线和部分国际航线免费上网；这次调整扩大到国内、国际宽体机航班。

item.title: 美国零售商引入 AI 应对退货欺诈
item.guid: 美国零售商引入-AI-应对退货欺诈
item.description:
According to Business Insider, as return fraud methods become increasingly sophisticated, U.S. retailers are accelerating the adoption of AI technology to combat this challenge. The "2025 Retail Returns Landscape Report" released by the National Retail Federation (NRF) and UPS's Happy Returns indicates that approximately 9% of returns are currently fraudulent. 据《商业内幕》报道，随着退货欺诈手段日益复杂，美国零售商正加速引入 AI 技术来应对这一挑战。全美零售联合会（NRF）与 UPS 旗下的 Happy Returns 发布的《2025 零售退货格局报告》显示，目前约 9% 的退货属于欺诈行为。

Retailers are shifting from traditional machine learning methods to more advanced AI systems to identify fraudulent behaviors such as label tampering, fake empty boxes, item swapping, and "wardrobing" (returning items after wearing them). 零售商正从传统的机器学习手段转向更先进的 AI 系统，以识别标签篡改、虚假空盒、商品掉包及「试穿后退货」等违规行为。

Juan Hernandez-Campos, COO of Happy Returns, stated that merchants can no longer solely rely on manual methods to handle the growing volume of returns. The company's Return Vision technology can detect product identification errors, label alterations, and material discrepancies in real-time. Happy Returns 首席运营官 Juan Hernandez-Campos 表示，商家已无法单纯依赖手动方式处理日益增长的退货量。该公司推出的 Return Vision 技术能够实时检测商品标识错误、标签改动及材质差异。

Furthermore, AI can perform risk scoring by analyzing return frequency, geographical location, and historical behavior, alerting for manual review before issuing refunds for high-risk returns. In addition to fraud detection, AI is also used to predict return probabilities, optimize inventory allocation, and automatically decide the disposition of returned items based on their resale value. 此外，AI 还能通过分析退货频率、地理位置及历史行为进行风险评分，在高风险退货发出退款前提醒人工审核。除欺诈检测外，AI 还被用于预测退货概率、优化库存调拨以及根据转售价值自动决策退货商品的去向。

item.title: 《杀死比尔：血色全传》定档 8 月 7 日
item.guid: 《杀死比尔：血色全传》定档-8-月-7-日
item.description:
Quentin Tarantino's violent aesthetic masterpiece, "Kill Bill: The Whole Bloody Affair," has officially been scheduled for release in mainland China on August 7. 昆汀·塔伦蒂诺导演的暴力美学作品《杀死比尔：血色全传》正式定档，将于 8 月 7 日在中国内地上映。

"Kill Bill: The Whole Bloody Affair" is the director's cut compilation of the "Kill Bill" series, starring Uma Thurman, Lucy Liu, and others. This version integrates the original first and second parts of the series, presenting them together, and includes new, previously unreleased footage while retaining the original classic content. 《杀死比尔：血色全传》是《杀死比尔》系列的导演剪辑合集版，由乌玛·瑟曼、刘玉玲等主演。该版本将原有的系列第一部与第二部进行整合呈现，并在保留原有经典内容的基础上，新增了此前未公开的全新片段。

The film tells the story of a female assassin, code-named "The Bride," who experiences betrayal and slaughter at her wedding, and after surviving, embarks on a global journey of bloody revenge. 影片讲述了代号为「新娘」的女杀手在婚礼现场遭遇背叛与杀戮，幸存后展开的一场横跨全球的血腥复仇之旅。

item.title: 动画电影《去你的岛》定档 8 月 19 日七夕上映
item.guid: 动画电影《去你的岛》定档-8-月-19-日七夕上映
item.description:
The animated film "Go to Your Island," adapted from Fan Dawang's novel of the same name, officially announced its release date yesterday, set to hit cinemas nationwide on August 19, this year's Qixi Festival. 改编自番大王同名小说的动画电影《去你的岛》昨日正式官宣定档，将于今年 8 月 19 日七夕节在全国上映。

The film tells the story of the protagonist, Wang Jiexiang, who, guided by a mysterious paper crane, travels alone to a fantastical island built from memories, embarking on a healing journey of deep love, missed opportunities, and reconciliation. 影片讲述女主角王结香在一只神秘千纸鹤的牵引下，孤身前往一座由记忆构筑的奇幻小岛，开启了一段关于深爱、错过与和解的治愈旅程。

The film is directed by Zhou Haoran, with Mei Qiongyu and the original author Fan Dawang co-serving as screenwriters. As a fantasy animation, the film presents the landscape of the memory island through a unique visual style, carrying the complex emotional bonds between the characters. 该片由周浩然执导，梅琼宇与原著作者番大王共同担任编剧。作为一部奇幻题材动画，影片通过独特的视觉风格呈现了记忆孤岛的景观，承载了角色之间复杂的情感羁绊。
